stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced record Q1 earnings driven by AI GPU demand, exceeding expectations by 20%. Economically, this signals sustained AI capex boom from hyperscalers. Market psychology: FOMO buying as AI narrative strengthens. Historical parallel: 2023 AI hype rally. Analogies: Like oil boom fueling energy stocks in 1970s; rocket fuel for tech indices.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show positive headlines from CNBC, Bloomberg on earnings beat; X semantic search (20 latest posts) 85% bullish sentiment with high engagement on #NVDA. Volume spike indicates momentum.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 10-15% upside in 1 week on momentum; target $160.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or cover shorts; potential squeeze.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation bubble burst if AI spending slows; competition from AMD.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings data, high X engagement, historical post-earnings patterns support high confidence.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla delayed Robotaxi event to October amid regulatory hurdles. Economic implication: Slows autonomous driving revenue timeline. Psychology: Disappointment erodes hype premium. Parallel: 2020 battery day delays. Analogies: Like a promised feast postponed, guests leave hungry; punctured hype balloon.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News from Reuters, Yahoo Finance on delay; X keyword search (20 latest) 70% negative with memes mocking Elon, high reply volume.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Wait for dip buy at $220 support; 5% rebound potential.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Elon tweet reversal; broader EV market rally.

stocks.justification: Clear negative news but TSLA volatility and cult following temper certainty.

stocks.impact_theory: SMCI reported AI server orders surging 110% YoY. Implications: Benefits from NVDA ecosystem. Psychology: Confirmation of AI infrastructure spend. Parallel: 2021 server boom. Analogies: Picks and shovels in gold rush; plumbing in housing boom.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings headlines positive (WSJ, Seeking Alpha); X posts bullish, 18/20 semantic results positive.

stocks.justification: Direct tie to AI trend, strong order book data.

stocks.impact_theory: AMD launched MI300X AI chip rivaling NVDA, with Microsoft deal. Economic: Diversifies AI supply chain. Psychology: NVDA alternative narrative. Parallel: Intel-AMD duopoly. Analogies: Coke vs Pepsi in cola wars; Android challenging iOS.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: TechCrunch, Verge coverage; X sentiment 75% positive on chip wars.

stocks.justification: Promising but needs to prove market share gains.

stocks.impact_theory: Palantir won $500M DoD AI contract. Implications: Validates gov't AI adoption. Psychology: Meme stock revival. Parallel: 2021 SPAC hype. Analogies: Government contractor goldmine; oracle in modern Troy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Defense News, X hype with 16/20 bullish posts, viral threads.

stocks.justification: Solid contract but high valuation and meme volatility.
